commit.subject: LU-13214 tests: simulate data-hole-data write
commit.message:
LU-13214 tests: simulate data-hole-data write

Test simulate MDT enospace, this leads to no grants
on a client, and partial fail write.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity env=ONLY=281
Signed-off-by: Alexander Boyko <alexander.boyko@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Id435af6450827de0bb61f6f40952a78882e4e06e
